subject: Two armored warriors fighting back-to-back against encircling Eldrazi tentacles and creatures
description: Two armored humanoid figures fight side by side against a swarm of dark Eldrazi limbs and creatures that press in from all angles. The foreground figure — larger, with long hair, armored in layered plate — lunges forward with a raised shield, their posture aggressive and protecting. A second figure is visible behind and below, also fighting. The Eldrazi forms are tentacular and chaotic, filling the upper corners and edges of the frame. The flavor text attributes a quote to Gideon Jura, and the foreground figure's build, shield, and dominant positioning are consistent with the character's canonical depiction; flagging as suspected IP. The background suggests a wet, rocky battlefield with a gray sky.
foreground: armored warrior lunging with a shield raised, another fighter behind them, both surrounded by Eldrazi appendages
background: gray rocky battlefield, splashing water, dark sky
